source_monitoring_policy.rollback_rule: If any source fails or changes unexpectedly, same-origin PDF delivery is disabled and the on-page viewer keeps the court-source fallback.

public_message: Reviewed PDFs can be viewed and downloaded on this site through approved same-origin court-source delivery. Cached copies remain disabled.
